name: 赤目温泉
sales_point: 滝川の渓谷沿いに位置する温泉地。赤目48滝の入り口にあり、香落渓の観光基地に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Takigawa gorge, at the entrance to the Akame 48 Waterfalls, making it a great base for exploring the Koochikake Valley.

name: 阿曽温泉
location: 三重県 度会郡大紀町
sales_point: 大宮町の南西部、大内山川畔に位置する温泉地。熊野灘へも近く、奥伊勢観光拠点にも便利。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the banks of the Ouchiyama River in the southwestern part of Omiya Town, close to Kumano-nada and convenient for exploring the Oku-Ise region.

name: あたしか温泉
sales_point: 日本水浴場55選の一つ、新鹿海水浴場の近くに位置する温泉地。夏には多くの海水浴客で賑わいを見せる。
sales_point_en: Located near the Shin-Katsu Beach, one of Japan's top 55 bathing beaches, this hot spring area is bustling with many beachgoers in the summer.

name: 安楽島温泉
sales_point: 鳥羽湾を高台から見おろす絶景の温泉地。
sales_point_en: A scenic hot spring area overlooking Toba Bay from a high vantage point.

name: 有久寺温泉
location: 三重県 北牟婁郡紀北町
sales_point: 真言密教の古刹、有久寺薬師堂の近くに位置する温泉地。鎌倉時代より飲浴霊泉と言われた名湯で、ラジウム含有量が多いことで知られている。
sales_point_en: Located near the ancient temple of Yukkuji Yakushido, this hot spring is known for its high radium content and has been celebrated as a healing spring since the Kamakura period.

name: 伊勢の郷温泉
location: 三重県 多気郡明和町
sales_point: 伊勢市と松阪市の間、明和町に位置する温泉地。薬草湯、歩行湯、ジェット風呂など7種類の浴槽が楽しめる。伊勢、松阪観光の足場にも好適。
sales_point_en: Situated between Ise City and Matsusaka City, this hot spring features seven types of baths including herbal baths, walking baths, and jet baths, making it a great base for sightseeing in Ise and Matsusaka.

name: 伊勢二見温泉
sales_point: 渚百選に選ばれた二見浦海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。眼下に伊勢湾を見下ろすことができ眺望が素晴らしい。海の幸を使った料理は絶品。
sales_point_en: Located along the Futamiura coast, selected as one of Japan's top beaches, this hot spring offers stunning views of Ise Bay and exquisite seafood cuisine.

name: 猪の倉温泉
sales_point: 青山高原のふもとに位置するPH9.7のアルカリ性の温泉で、「美肌の湯」であり、肌ざわりなめらかな湯心地が満喫できます。
sales_point_en: An alkaline hot spring with a pH of 9.7 located at the foot of the Aoyama Highlands, known for its 'beauty skin' properties and smooth bathing experience.

name: 入鹿温泉
sales_point: 紀和町の第2泉源としてＨ９年に湧出した温泉。町の中心部板谷地区に位置している。湯量は湯ノ口よりも豊富で、効能も高い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring that emerged in 1997 as the second source in Kiwa Town, located in the central Itaya area, known for its abundant water supply and high efficacy.

name: 相差温泉
sales_point: 鳥羽湾に浮かぶ島々を眺め、静かな浜辺湾を臨む温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area with views of the islands floating in Toba Bay, overlooking a quiet beach cove.

name: 奥伊勢宮川温泉
sales_point: 宮川の清流沿いに位置する温泉地。山々に囲まれたあ自然の中にある。湯は重曹を含み、肌が滑らかになることから、「美人の湯」と言われている。
sales_point_en: Located along the clear stream of the Miyagawa River, this hot spring is surrounded by mountains and is known for its bicarbonate-rich water, often referred to as 'beauty spring' for its skin-smoothing properties.

name: 小浜温泉
sales_point: 鳥羽湾に浮かぶ島々を眺め、静かな浜辺湾を臨む温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area with views of the islands in Toba Bay, overlooking a tranquil beach cove.

name: 奥香肌峡温泉
sales_point: 迷岳の北東側山麓、県立公園内に位置する温泉地。通年しし鍋や鹿肉のしゃぶしゃぶ、刺身を味わうことができる。奥香肌峡や宮ノ谷渓谷、江馬小屋渓谷などが近く、景観が美しい。
sales_point_en: Located on the northeastern foothills of Meigaku Mountain within a prefectural park, this hot spring offers seasonal delicacies like wild boar hot pot and deer meat shabu-shabu, with beautiful scenery nearby.

name: 香落渓温泉
sales_point: 青連寺ダム湖近くに位置する温泉地。露天風呂が完備されている。付近に観光ブドウ園がある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located near the Aorenji Dam Lake, featuring outdoor baths and nearby tourist grape farms.

name: 片岡温泉
location: 三重県 三重郡菰野町
sales_point: 鈴鹿山脈の主峰、御在所岳の東側裾野に位置する温泉地。自然に恵まれた閑静な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the eastern foothills of the main peak of the Suzuka Mountains, in a tranquil environment blessed by nature.

name: 川口温泉
sales_point: 榊原温泉を源とする天然の湯を湛えた大浴場があるリゾート施設。スポーツ施設も充実している。
sales_point_en: A resort facility featuring a large public bath filled with natural hot spring water sourced from Sakakibara Onsen, along with ample sports facilities.

name: 木曽岬温泉
location: 三重県 桑名郡木曽岬町
sales_point: 伊勢湾を望む木曽川の河口近くに位置する温泉地。砂利風呂という入浴法がある。
sales_point_en: Located near the mouth of the Kiso River overlooking Ise Bay, this hot spring features a unique bathing method known as 'gravel bath.'

name: きほく千年温泉
location: 三重県 北牟婁郡紀北町

name: 霧生温泉
sales_point: 青山高原に位置する温泉地。美肌効果があるといわれる。テニス、ゴルフ場など、スポーツ施設が充実している。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the Aoyama Highlands, reputed for its skin-beautifying effects, with ample sports facilities including tennis and golf courses.

name: 国崎温泉
sales_point: 南鳥羽の暖かい気候と、高齢者・障害者にもやさしいハートビル法に認定された温泉施設あり。
sales_point_en: A hot spring facility recognized under the Heart Building Law, providing a warm climate in southern Toba, accessible for the elderly and disabled.

name: 熊野温泉
sales_point: 熊野市駅の北西約1キロの熊野市街を見おろす高台に位置する温泉地。白砂青松100選の七里御浜が近く、熊野観光の拠点として好適。
sales_point_en: Located on a hill overlooking the city of Kumano, about 1 kilometer northwest of Kumano City Station. Close to the beautiful Shichiri Mihama beach, it serves as a great base for Kumano tourism.

name: 榊原温泉
sales_point: 榊原川沿いに位置する温泉地。「枕草子」にも謳われた古湯。平安時代に泉質の良さは京の都にまで届いていたと伝えられる。川のほとりの閑静な環境は、保養に最適。
sales_point_en: A historic hot spring along the Sakakibara River, mentioned in 'The Pillow Book'. It is said that the quality of the spring was known as far as the capital during the Heian period. The tranquil riverside environment is perfect for relaxation.

name: 坂部温泉
sales_point: 海蔵川の右岸にある温泉。
sales_point_en: A hot spring located on the right bank of the Kaizō River.

name: 佐田温泉
sales_point: 緑豊かな自然に恵まれた青山高原の麓に位置する温泉地。肌触りがなめらかな湯心地楽しめる温泉保養施設。
sales_point_en: Situated at the foot of the lush Aoyama Highlands, this hot spring offers smooth and pleasant waters, making it an ideal wellness facility.

name: 俊乗温泉
sales_point: 笠取山の北側山麓、新大佛寺に位置する温泉地。多くの重要文化財を参拝した後、温泉でくつろぎ、精進料理に舌鼓。大自然と歴史の宝庫で心身共に清められ、リフレッシュできる。
sales_point_en: Located at the foot of Mount Kasatori, near the Shin Daibutsu Temple. After visiting many important cultural properties, relax in the hot springs and enjoy vegetarian cuisine. A treasure trove of nature and history, perfect for rejuvenation.

name: 答志島温泉
sales_point: 鳥羽湾に浮かぶ答志島の和具港の近くに位置する温泉地。自然環境に恵まれ、眺望が良い。
sales_point_en: Located near Wagu Port on Toshijima Island, which floats in Toba Bay. Surrounded by a rich natural environment with great views.

name: 長島温泉
sales_point: ゆったりと流れる詩情豊かな木曽川、長良川の河口に位置する温泉地。総合レジャーランドが隣接しており、家族連れで充分楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring located at the mouth of the Kiso and Nagara Rivers, flowing gently. Adjacent to a comprehensive leisure land, it is perfect for families.

name: 鍋田川温泉
location: 三重県 桑名郡木曽岬町
sales_point: 木曽岬温泉の北方約5キロ地点に位置する温泉地。自然環境に恵まれており、近くの海岸ではしじみ採りが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: Located about 5 kilometers north of Kisosaki Onsen, this hot spring is blessed with a natural environment, and nearby beaches offer clam digging.

name: 浜島温泉
sales_point: 伊勢志摩国立公園の南端に位置する温泉地。黒潮おどる雄大な熊野灘と、真珠いかだが浮かぶ波静かな英虞湾に囲まれたリゾート地。美人の湯と言われている。
sales_point_en: Located at the southern tip of Ise-Shima National Park, this resort is surrounded by the majestic Kumano Sea and the calm Ago Bay with floating pearl rafts. Known as a beauty hot spring.

name: 火の谷温泉
sales_point: 伊勢八知駅から程近い尼ヶ岳東側山麓に位置する温泉地。尼ヶ岳は伊賀富士とも呼ばれており、登山基地に好適。遊園地などとも隣接されているリゾート温泉。
sales_point_en: Located on the eastern foothills of Mount Nikaidake, close to Ise Hachichi Station. Known as Iga Fuji, it is a great base for mountain climbing and is adjacent to amusement parks.

name: 船越温泉
sales_point: 志摩半島最南端に位置する温泉地。眼前が雄大な太平洋という風光明媚な環境にある。すぐ近くに船越海水浴場があり、夏は家族連れなどが多い。
sales_point_en: Located at the southernmost tip of the Shima Peninsula, this hot spring offers a scenic environment with the vast Pacific Ocean right in front. Close to Funakoshi Beach, it attracts many families in summer.

name: 松蔭温泉
sales_point: 長島温泉の北、約1キロ地点の松蔭地区に位置する温泉地。
sales_point_en: Located about 1 kilometer north of Nagashima Onsen in the Shouin area.

name: 松ケ島温泉
sales_point: 木曽川沿いに位置する温泉地。近郊の人々に保養場として親しまれている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring located along the Kiso River, popular as a wellness spot among local residents.

name: 三浦温泉
location: 三重県 北牟婁郡紀北町
sales_point: ＪＲ道瀬駅の西方に位置する温泉地。太平洋を望む丘陵地にあり、眺望が良い。高塚台公園もすぐ近くにあり環境が良い。
sales_point_en: Located west of JR Michiseki Station, this hot spring is on a hill overlooking the Pacific Ocean, offering great views. Close to Takatsukadai Park, it has a pleasant environment.

name: 本浦温泉
sales_point: 伊勢志摩国立公園内、南鳥羽の麻生の浦湾を臨む温泉地。風光明媚な環境にあり、浦村カキの産地としても知られる。
sales_point_en: Located within Ise-Shima National Park, overlooking the Aso-no-Ura Bay in southern Toba. Known for its scenic beauty and as a production area for Urakami oysters.

name: 湯ノ口温泉
sales_point: 三重県最南端、湯ノ口川沿いに位置する温泉地。鉱山跡を利用してトロッコ電車が運行されている。湯量は豊富で泉質も良い。昔から薬湯として親しまれてきた。国民保養温泉地に指定され、保養・療養に好適。
sales_point_en: Located along the Yunokuchi River at the southernmost point of Mie Prefecture. A trolley train operates using an old mine site. Abundant hot water and good quality, traditionally known as a medicinal bath. Designated as a national wellness hot spring, ideal for relaxation and therapy.

name: 湯の山温泉
location: 三重県 三重郡菰野町
sales_point: 鈴鹿山脈の最高峰、御在所岳の東側山麓に位置する温泉地。718年に発見された古湯で別名鹿の湯。御在所岳へは温泉街からロープウェイがある。四季折々の景観に恵まれた環境にある。
sales_point_en: Located on the eastern foothills of Mount Gozaisho, the highest peak of the Suzuka Mountains. This ancient hot spring, discovered in 718, is also known as 'Deer Hot Spring'. A ropeway connects to Mount Gozaisho from the hot spring town, surrounded by beautiful seasonal scenery.

name: わたかの（渡鹿野）温泉
sales_point: 磯部町東部の渡鹿野島に位置する温泉地。近くには中部地方最大のテーマパーク、志摩スペイン村がある。冬は名産の的矢カキが味わえる。
sales_point_en: Located on Watakano Island in the eastern part of Isobe Town. Close to the largest theme park in the Chubu region, Shima Spain Village. In winter, you can enjoy the local specialty, Matoya oysters.

name: 秋神温泉
sales_point: 秋神川の渓流沿いに位置する温泉地。白樺、カラマツに囲まれ、秋の紅葉は特に美しい。毎年、2月に氷まつりが行われ、雪景色の中で花火があげられ、とても幻想的。
sales_point_en: Located along the Akigami River, surrounded by white birch and larch trees, with particularly beautiful autumn foliage. An ice festival is held every February, featuring fireworks in a snowy landscape, creating a magical atmosphere.

name: 明世温泉
sales_point: 土岐川支流の日吉川東側河畔に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にある。背後に化石公園があり、ハイキングも楽しめる。
sales_point_en: Located on the eastern bank of the Hiyoshi River, a tributary of the Toki River. Situated in a quiet environment, with a fossil park nearby for hiking.

name: 稲荷温泉
sales_point: 稲荷神社の境内に位置する温泉地。日帰りで温泉が楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring located within the grounds of Inari Shrine, perfect for day trips.

name: 岩寿温泉
sales_point: 薬研山の麓に位置する温泉地。松林に囲まれた山あいの閑静な環境にあり、保養・休養に好適。マス釣り、松茸狩りが近くで楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A tranquil hot spring area at the foot of Yagen Mountain, surrounded by pine forests, ideal for relaxation and recuperation. Enjoy fishing for trout and mushroom picking nearby.

name: 恵那峡湯元温泉
sales_point: 四季の自然と渓谷美を誇る恵那峡沿いに位置する温泉地。恵那峡探勝の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: Located along the beautiful Enakyo Gorge, this hot spring is a great base for exploring the seasonal nature and scenic views.

name: 恵那峡ラジウム温泉
sales_point: 恵那峡沿いに位置する温泉地。峡谷の自然環境が美しい。恵那峡探勝の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring situated along Enakyo Gorge, known for its beautiful natural environment, making it a great base for exploration.

name: 鬼岩温泉
location: 岐阜県 可児郡御嵩町
sales_point: 次月川の支流沿いの鬼岩公園内に位置する温泉地。傷ついた白鷺の湯浴みを見て発見したと伝えられ、歴史が永い。鬼岩公園の岩穴くぐりや桜や紅葉の美しい渓谷美で有名。
sales_point_en: Located within Oniiwa Park along a tributary of the Tsukigawa River, this hot spring has a long history, discovered by observing a wounded white heron bathing. Famous for its rock caves and beautiful cherry blossoms and autumn leaves.

name: 鬼岩温泉
sales_point: 飛騨木曽川国定公園内に位置する温泉地。渓流に沿った閑静な環境にある。鬼人伝説のある国定鬼岩公園の岩穴くぐりや美濃焼の産地としても知られる。
sales_point_en: Nestled in the Hida-Kiso River National Park, this hot spring is in a quiet environment along a mountain stream. Known for its rock caves and the legend of the Oni, as well as being a production area for Mino pottery.

name: 海津温泉
sales_point: 長良川と大江川に挟まれたのどかな田園風景の中に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にあり、保養・静養に好適。
sales_point_en: Set in a peaceful rural landscape between the Nagara River and Oe River, this hot spring is ideal for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 柿野温泉
sales_point: 妻木川上流に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にあり、湯の漂白効果が高いと伝えられている。
sales_point_en: Located upstream of the Tsumaki River, this hot spring is in a quiet environment and is said to have a high bleaching effect.

name: 釜戸温泉
sales_point: 土岐川沿いの高台に位置する温泉地。土岐川の支流、不動沢には竜吟の滝があり、観光客も多く訪れる。瑞浪市のほぼ中央に位置する温泉地。
sales_point_en: Situated on a hill along the Toki River, this hot spring is centrally located in Mizunami City, with the nearby Fudozawa River featuring the Ryugin Falls, attracting many tourists.

name: 臥竜温泉
sales_point: 国道41号線沿いに位置する温泉地。車で5分の距離に天然記念物に指定されている臥竜桜があり、桜の頃は特に美しい。天然の露天風呂がある。
sales_point_en: Located along National Route 41, this hot spring is just 5 minutes from the natural monument Garyu Sakura, which is especially beautiful during cherry blossom season. It features natural outdoor baths.

name: 下呂温泉
sales_point: 飛騨川沿いに位置する温泉地。1000年程の歴史を持ち、草津・有馬と共に日本三名泉のひとつに数えられる名湯。岐阜県下最大の温泉地。
sales_point_en: A historic hot spring along the Hida River, recognized as one of Japan's three famous hot springs alongside Kusatsu and Arima, with a history of about 1000 years. It is the largest hot spring area in Gifu Prefecture.

name: 下呂（萩原下呂）温泉
sales_point: 隣接する下呂町にある下呂温泉に含まれる温泉地。1000年ほどの歴史を持ち、草津・有馬と共に日本三名泉のひとつに数えられる名湯。岐阜県下最大の温泉地。
sales_point_en: Part of the Gero Onsen in the adjacent Gero Town, this hot spring also boasts a history of about 1000 years and is recognized as one of Japan's three famous hot springs.

name: 坂下温泉
sales_point: ＪＲ坂下駅の北西約2キロ、長野県との県境近くに位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にあり、保養・静養に好適。
sales_point_en: Located about 2 kilometers northwest of JR Sakashita Station, near the border with Nagano Prefecture, this hot spring is in a quiet environment, ideal for relaxation.

name: 塩沢温泉
sales_point: 飛騨川沿いに位置する温泉地。野麦街道の宿場町として親しまれてきた。山々の眺望が素晴らしい。
sales_point_en: A hot spring along the Hida River, known as a post town on the Nōbi Highway, offering stunning views of the surrounding mountains.

name: 下島（小坂温泉郷）
sales_point: 濁河渓谷の清流沿いに位置する温泉地。小坂温泉郷の一角で、古くから湯治場として知られてきた。近くの「がんだて公園」には大岩壁の「巖立」や滝見遊歩道がある。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: Located along the clear stream of the Daku River Valley, this hot spring is part of the Kosaka Onsen area, historically known as a healing spot. Nearby 'Gandate Park' features a large rock wall and a scenic walking path.

name: 白川温泉
location: 岐阜県 加茂郡白川町
sales_point: 「白川口駅」の近くに位置する温泉地。背後に山が迫り、閑静で風光明媚な環境にある。近くに奇岩怪石の飛水峡があり、７月からは鮎釣り客で賑わう。
sales_point_en: Located near Shirakawa-guchi Station, this hot spring is set against a backdrop of mountains in a quiet and picturesque environment. The nearby Hishimizu Gorge is famous for its unique rock formations and attracts many visitors for ayu fishing starting in July.

name: 白川郷平瀬温泉
location: 岐阜県 大野郡白川村
sales_point: 合掌づくりの集落で有名な白川郷の平瀬地区に位置する温泉地。国民保養温泉地に指定されている。昔から子供に恵まれる子宝の湯としても知られている。
sales_point_en: Situated in the Hirase area of the famous Shirakawa-go village, known for its gassho-zukuri architecture, this hot spring is designated as a national health resort and is historically known as a place for fertility.

name: 新平湯（奥飛騨温泉郷）
sales_point: 焼岳の西側山麓に広がる温泉地。奥飛騨温泉郷の一角。各宿が持つ露天風呂は素晴らしく、野趣に溢れる。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area spreading at the foot of Yake-dake Mountain, part of the Okuhida Onsen region. The outdoor baths at various inns are wonderful and full of natural charm.

name: 新白狐温泉
sales_point: 土岐川沿いの閑静な環境にある温泉地。江戸中期に大雲和尚が傷ついた白狐に教えられた温泉と伝えられている。
sales_point_en: Located in a quiet environment along the Toki River, this hot spring is said to have been discovered in the Edo period when a monk named Daigumo was guided by an injured white fox.

name: 新穂高（奥飛騨温泉郷）
sales_point: 蒲田川沿いに位置し、奥飛騨温泉郷最奥の秘湯。登山客やスキーヤーで一年中賑わっている。新穂高ロープウェイで2156メートルの高所に登ると、大自然のパノラマが楽しめる。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: Situated along the Kamata River, this is the innermost hidden hot spring of the Okuhida Onsen area, bustling with hikers and skiers year-round. The Shin-Hotaka Ropeway takes you to an elevation of 2156 meters, offering a panoramic view of nature.

name: 神明温泉
sales_point: 岐阜県中央部西寄りの関市板取地区に所在する温泉地。板取川の上流に位置し、奥美濃の自然に囲まれた１軒宿。近隣には断崖が７㎞ほど続く川浦渓谷などの見どころがある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the Itadori district of Seki City, in the western part of central Gifu Prefecture. It is situated upstream of the Itadori River, surrounded by the natural beauty of the Oku-Mino region. Nearby attractions include the stunning cliffs of the Kawauka Gorge, which stretch for about 7 km.

name: 数河温泉
sales_point: 国道41号線沿いに位置する温泉地。湯は鉄分が多く含まれており、とても温まる。スキー、ゴルフを楽しむことができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along National Route 41. The water is rich in iron, providing a warm and soothing experience. It is also a great spot for skiing and golfing.

name: 高畑温泉
sales_point: 那比川上流部の谷あいに位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にあり、保養・休養に好適。
sales_point_en: A tranquil hot spring area located in a valley upstream of the Nabi River. It offers a peaceful environment, ideal for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 付知温泉
sales_point: 長野県境に近い付知川上流の付知渓谷付近に位置する温泉地。渓谷美で知られており、特に紅葉の頃は絶景。
sales_point_en: Situated near the Tsukechi Gorge, upstream of the Tsukechi River, close to the Nagano Prefecture border. Known for its scenic gorge, it offers breathtaking views, especially during the autumn foliage.

name: 桃源郷温泉
sales_point: 桃源郷に位置する温泉地。古川町営の温泉施設がある。早朝、野菜の収穫体験をすることができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the Togenkyo region. It features a public hot spring facility operated by Furukawa Town. Visitors can experience vegetable harvesting in the early morning.

name: 栃尾（奥飛騨温泉郷）
sales_point: 高原川と蒲田川の合流点付近に位置する温泉地。奥飛騨温泉郷の一角を占め、素朴な雰囲気を持つ。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: Located near the confluence of the Takahara and Kamata rivers, this hot spring area is part of the Okuhida Onsen Village and has a rustic atmosphere. It is recognized as a national health resort.

name: 渡合温泉
sales_point: 御岳山の南側山麓、付知川西股の上流の山あいに位置する温泉地。自家発電なので22時以降はランプになる。新緑、紅葉は見事で森林浴に絶好。12月中旬～3月下旬休業。
sales_point_en: Nestled in the mountains on the southern foothills of Mount Ontake, upstream of the Tsukechi River. It operates on self-generated power, so lamps are used after 10 PM. The fresh greenery and autumn leaves are stunning, making it perfect for forest bathing. Closed from mid-December to late March.

name: 中津川温泉
sales_point: 湯舟沢川の清流沿いに位置する温泉地。露天風呂の他、13種類もの風呂が完備されている。自然環境が良く、保養・休養に好適。
sales_point_en: Located along the clear stream of the Yubunozawa River, this hot spring area features 13 different types of baths, including outdoor baths. The natural environment is excellent, making it suitable for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 長良川温泉
sales_point: 金華山のふもとに位置する温泉地。鵜飼いで有名な長良川に沿って温泉街が広がる。市街地には数々の史跡が点在しており、観光基地としても人気がある。
sales_point_en: Situated at the foot of Mount Kinka, this hot spring area stretches along the famous Nagara River, known for its cormorant fishing. The city is dotted with historical sites, making it a popular base for tourism.

name: 濁河（小坂温泉郷）
sales_point: 濁河渓谷沿いに位置する温泉地。御岳山の西側山腹、標高1800メートルの高所にある。小坂温泉郷の中心で、飛騨観光の拠点に好適。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: Located along the Daku River Gorge, this hot spring area sits at an elevation of 1800 meters on the western slope of Mount Ontake. It serves as a central hub for Hida tourism and is recognized as a national health resort.

name: 乗政温泉
sales_point: 益田川の支流、乗政川沿いに位置する温泉地。ひなびた雰囲気を持ち、保養・休養に好適。温泉で炊くおかゆが名物。
sales_point_en: Situated along the Norimasa River, a tributary of the Masuda River, this hot spring area has a rustic charm, making it ideal for relaxation and recuperation. The specialty is rice porridge cooked in the hot spring.

name: 萩原温泉
sales_point: 周囲を田んぼに囲まれたのどかな温泉地。こじんまりとして素朴な雰囲気。益田川では鮎釣りが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A peaceful hot spring area surrounded by rice fields, offering a cozy and rustic atmosphere. Visitors can enjoy sweetfish fishing in the Masuda River.

name: 羽島温泉
sales_point: 長良川と木曽川に挟まれたのどかな田園地帯の中に位置する温泉地。テニス、ゲートボール等のスポーツ施設も完備。周囲には円空仏などの見所も多い。
sales_point_en: Located in a tranquil rural area between the Nagara and Kiso rivers, this hot spring area is equipped with sports facilities such as tennis and gateball. There are also many attractions nearby, including Enku Buddha statues.

name: 初音温泉
sales_point: 小駄良川の渓流沿いに位置する温泉地。山々に囲まれたのどかな雰囲気を持ち、保養・休養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the stream of the Odara River, surrounded by mountains, offering a peaceful atmosphere ideal for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 東山温泉
sales_point: 紅葉の名所恵那峡の北約5キロの山あいに位置する温泉地。静かな環境にあり、保養・静養に好適。周辺ではマス釣りや山菜採りが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: Located about 5 kilometers north of the famous autumn foliage spot, Ena Gorge, this hot spring area is in a quiet environment, perfect for recuperation. Nearby, visitors can enjoy trout fishing and wild vegetable picking.

name: 飛騨数河温泉
sales_point: 標高1000メートルの数河高原のリゾート地の中に位置する温泉地。スキー場が隣接しており、スポーツ後に疲れを癒すのには最高。北アルプス、白山連峰を眺望できる。
sales_point_en: Situated in a resort area at an elevation of 1000 meters on the Sugo Plateau, this hot spring area is adjacent to a ski resort, making it perfect for relaxing after sports. It offers views of the Northern Alps and the Hakusan mountain range.

name: 飛騨高山温泉
sales_point: ＪＲ高山駅の南部、高山市郊外に位置する温泉地。飛騨高山の観光拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: Located in the southern part of Takayama City, near JR Takayama Station, this hot spring area is an excellent base for exploring Takayama.

name: 飛騨にゅうかわ温泉
sales_point: 乗鞍岳北西側山麓、朴の木平スキー場に隣接している温泉地。四方を山に囲まれており、大自然の四季折々の風情にふれることができる。スキーや登山の疲れをいやすには最適。
sales_point_en: Adjacent to the Hakuba Ski Resort on the northwest foothills of Mount Norikura, this hot spring area is surrounded by mountains, allowing visitors to experience the beauty of nature throughout the seasons. It is ideal for relieving fatigue from skiing and hiking.

name: 平湯（奥飛騨温泉郷）
sales_point: 乗鞍岳の山麓1200メートルに位置する温泉地。武田信玄が発見したと伝えられる。奥飛騨温泉郷の中心で、奥飛騨を始め、飛騨高山・上高地などの観光拠点となる。国民温泉保養地。
sales_point_en: Located at an elevation of 1200 meters on the foothills of Mount Norikura, this hot spring area is said to have been discovered by Takeda Shingen. It serves as a central hub for Okuhida Onsen Village and is a great base for exploring the Hida Takayama and Kamikochi areas. Recognized as a national hot spring health resort.

name: 白狐温泉
sales_point: 土岐川沿いの閑静な環境にある温泉地。江戸中期に大雲和尚が傷ついた白狐に教えられた温泉と伝えられている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a quiet environment along the Toki River. It is said that a monk named Daikun was guided to this hot spring by an injured white fox during the Edo period.

name: 福地（奥飛騨温泉郷）
sales_point: 高原川岸に位置する温泉地。奥飛騨温泉郷のひとつで、平家落人の伝説が残されている。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located by the Takahara River. It is one of the Okuhida Onsen-go and is associated with the legend of the Heike clan's fugitives. A national health resort.

name: ふたこえ温泉
sales_point: 村の中心部に位置する温泉地。登山、スキー、キャンプ、釣り、紅葉狩りなどが楽しめる。平成11年秋には車で5分程の高鷲ICが開通予定。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the center of the village. Enjoy activities such as mountain climbing, skiing, camping, fishing, and autumn leaf viewing. The Takasu IC, about 5 minutes by car, is scheduled to open in autumn 1999.

name: 古川温泉
sales_point: 猪臥山、尾崎山などの山々に囲まれた、古川町の市街に位置する温泉地。各観光施設に近く便利。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the city of Furukawa, surrounded by mountains such as Inogashiyama and Ozakiyama. Conveniently close to various tourist facilities.

name: 南飛騨馬瀬川温泉
sales_point: 馬の瀬のように連なる山々に囲まれた馬瀬村に位置する温泉地。清流馬瀬川でアユ釣り等が楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Mase Village, surrounded by mountains resembling horse's backs. Enjoy Ayu fishing in the clear Mase River.

name: 明宝温泉
sales_point: 吉田川の川畔に位置する温泉地。山々に囲まれて村営の温泉施設がある。吉田川や気良川では渓流釣りが楽しめ、飛騨せせらぎ街道は秋になると紅葉の美しい道として知られる。施設まで直接の交通手段がないので徒歩のみとなる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located by the Yoshida River. Surrounded by mountains, it features a village-operated hot spring facility. Enjoy stream fishing in the Yoshida and Kira Rivers, and the Hida Seseragi Road is known for its beautiful autumn foliage. There is no direct transportation to the facility, so access is on foot only.

name: 母袋温泉
sales_point: 母袋烏帽子岳南西側山麓に位置する温泉地。キャンプやルアーフライ釣場が有り、通年様々なアウトドアスポーツを楽しむことができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the southwestern foot of Bodai Eboshidake. It offers camping and lure fishing spots, allowing for various outdoor sports year-round.

name: 山岡滝温泉
sales_point: 豊かな自然林と清流に囲まれた温泉地。子供から大人まで、ゆっくりと心身共にリラックスできる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area surrounded by rich natural forests and clear streams. A place where both children and adults can relax and unwind.

name: 山神温泉
sales_point: 静かな山あいの温泉地。落武者が薬師に導かれて発見したと伝えられる。
sales_point_en: A quiet hot spring area in the mountains. It is said to have been discovered by a fugitive samurai guided by a deity.

name: 湯の島温泉
sales_point: 恵那峡の山側に位置する温泉地。山間の閑静な環境にあり、保養・静養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the mountain side of Ena Gorge. It is in a tranquil environment, ideal for recuperation and relaxation.

name: 湯屋（小坂温泉郷）
sales_point: 小坂川沿いに位置する温泉地。小坂温泉郷の一角で、400年以上の歴史を持つ。日本有数の炭酸含有量を誇る泉質が特徴。飛騨観光の拠点に好適。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Kosaka River. Part of the Kosaka Onsen-go, it boasts a history of over 400 years. Known for its high carbonated water content, it is a great base for Hida tourism. A national health resort.

name: 養老温泉
location: 岐阜県 養老郡養老町
sales_point: 濃尾平野を一望できる養老公園の中に位置する温泉地。養老天命反転地や養老の滝など見所も多い。川魚料理やしし鍋が名物。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located within Yoro Park, offering a panoramic view of the Nobi Plain. Many attractions such as Yoro's famous reversal of fate and Yoro Falls are nearby. River fish cuisine and wild boar hot pot are local specialties.

name: 鷲ヶ岳温泉
sales_point: 鷲ヶ岳北西山麓に位置する温泉地。スキー、ゴルフ、テニス、登山などが楽しめるリゾート。平成11年秋には車で5分程の高鷲ICが開通予定。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the northwestern foot of Washigatake. A resort where you can enjoy skiing, golf, tennis, and mountain climbing. The Takasu IC, about 5 minutes by car, is scheduled to open in autumn 1999.

name: 一宮温泉
sales_point: 一宮ICから約1分とアクセスの便利な温泉地。各部屋天然温泉付の貸別荘。活づくりも並ぶ宴会もできる。貸別荘形式なので家族連れにも好適。
sales_point_en: A conveniently accessible hot spring area located about 1 minute from Ichinomiya IC. Each room has its own natural hot spring, and it can accommodate banquets with live seafood. The villa format makes it suitable for families.

name: 犬山温泉
sales_point: 国際会議都市犬山の中心である、国宝犬山城のすぐ近くに位置する温泉地。日本モンキーパーク、木曽川の犬山鵜飼、日本ライン下りなどが楽しめる。犬山観光の拠点に最高。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located very close to Inuyama Castle, a national treasure and the center of the international conference city of Inuyama. Enjoy attractions like the Japan Monkey Park, Inuyama Ukai on the Kiso River, and the Japan Line boat ride. An excellent base for Inuyama tourism.

name: 内海山海（南知多温泉郷）
location: 愛知県 知多郡南知多町
sales_point: 知多半島の南端に位置する温泉地。内海地区と山海地区に分かれたマリンリゾート。南知多温泉郷の中心。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the southern tip of the Chita Peninsula. A marine resort divided into Utsumi and Yamakai areas. The center of Minami Chita Onsen-go.

name: 永和温泉
sales_point: ＪＲ永和駅の北西約2キロ、住宅地の中に位置する温泉地。近郊の人々の保養場として親しまれている。弥富、蟹江両ICのほぼ中間にあり、移動に便利。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located about 2 kilometers northwest of JR Eiwa Station, in a residential area. It is cherished as a health resort for local residents. Conveniently located almost midway between the Yatomi and Kanie ICs.

name: 小渡温泉
sales_point: 矢作川の河畔に位置する温泉地。静かな環境にあり、大自然の中で魚のつかみ取り体験ができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located by the Yahagi River. In a quiet environment, you can experience fish catching in the great outdoors.

name: 尾張温泉
location: 愛知県 海部郡蟹江町
sales_point: 佐尾川沿いに位置する温泉地。名古屋からも車で約15分と近い場所にある。佐屋川は魚釣りのメッカで釣り人に人気。行楽・保養などに好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Sago River. It is only about 15 minutes by car from Nagoya. The Sayo River is a popular spot for fishing enthusiasts. Ideal for leisure and health.

name: 坂井温泉
sales_point: 伊勢湾に面した丘陵地に位置する温泉地。行楽向きで、潮干狩り・海水浴に最適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in hilly terrain facing Ise Bay. Suitable for leisure activities, perfect for clam digging and swimming.

name: 笹戸温泉
sales_point: 矢作川東岸の山麓に位置する温泉地。愛知県最古の温泉と言われる。閑静な環境で保養・静養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the foot of the mountains on the east bank of the Yahagi River. Said to be the oldest hot spring in Aichi Prefecture. A quiet environment, ideal for recuperation and relaxation.

name: 猿投温泉
sales_point: 猿投山の山麓に位置する温泉地。豊かな自然に恵まれ、静寂な環境にある。天然ラドンの湯は効能多数。入湯のみも可。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the foot of Mount Sarutobi. Blessed with rich nature, it offers a tranquil environment. The natural radon hot spring has numerous health benefits. Day-use is also available.

name: 塩津温泉
location: 愛知県 北設楽郡設楽町
sales_point: 寒狭川の支流野々瀬川沿いに位置する温泉地。山里のひなびた環境にある。山菜やキノコ採り、アユ釣りやハイキングなど自然の中でおおいに楽しむことができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the tributary Nonose River of the Kankagawa River. It is situated in a rustic mountain village environment. Visitors can enjoy mountain vegetables, mushroom picking, ayu fishing, and hiking in nature.

name: 白鷺温泉
sales_point: 巴川の南岸に位置する温泉地。中馬街道の宿場町として賑わいをみせた歴史を持ち、紅葉の名所として知られる香嵐渓にも近く、夏にはヤナ場が開かれる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the southern bank of the Tomoe River. It has a history as a bustling post town on the Chuma Highway and is close to Korankei, known for its beautiful autumn leaves. In summer, a fishing area is opened.

name: 添沢温泉
location: 愛知県 北設楽郡設楽町
sales_point: 緑の松林に囲まれた丘陵地に位置する温泉地。奥三河の自然がそのまま残っており、閑静な環境にある。美肌作用があり、女性に人気が高い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a hilly region surrounded by green pine forests. The natural beauty of the Okumikawa area remains intact, providing a quiet environment. It is popular among women for its skin beautifying effects.

name: 祖父江木曽川荘温泉
sales_point: 木曽川を挟んで岐阜県に隣接する祖父江町に位置する温泉地。日帰り、宿泊に関わらず必ず予約が必要となるので注意。（ＴＥＬ0587-97-3120）
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Sobue Town, adjacent to Gifu Prefecture across the Kiso River. Reservations are required for both day-use and overnight stays. (TEL: 0587-97-3120)

name: 大名古屋温泉
sales_point: 庄内川河畔、近鉄八田駅西方に位置する温泉地。住宅地の中にあり、近隣の人々の保養所として賑わっている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the banks of the Shonai River, west of Kintetsu Hatta Station. It is situated in a residential area and is popular as a health resort for local residents.

name: 中京温泉
sales_point: ＪＲ名古屋駅西方約2キロの市街地に位置する温泉地。交通の便が良く、名古屋観光やビジネスに好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located about 2 kilometers west of JR Nagoya Station in the city center. It has good transportation access, making it suitable for sightseeing and business in Nagoya.

name: 夏焼温泉
sales_point: 岐阜・長野との県境近くに位置する温泉地。浅間神社の境内に源泉を持つ。静かな環境にあり、奥三河探勝の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located near the border of Gifu and Nagano Prefectures. It has a source within the grounds of Asama Shrine. The quiet environment makes it an ideal base for exploring Okumikawa.

name: 西浦温泉
sales_point: 西浦半島の先端に位置する温泉地。目前に三河湾が広がり、風光明媚な環境にある。マリンスポーツや海水浴を楽しむ人々で賑わう。三河湾の海の幸が美味。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the tip of the Nishiura Peninsula. The scenic Mikawa Bay spreads out before you, creating a picturesque environment. It is bustling with people enjoying marine sports and swimming. The seafood from Mikawa Bay is delicious.

name: 平畑温泉
sales_point: 矢作川の清流沿いに位置する温泉地。美しい自然の中にあり、保養・休養に好適。小原村は和紙のふるさととしても知られており、和紙工芸館で、体験・見学ができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the clear stream of the Yahagi River. Surrounded by beautiful nature, it is ideal for relaxation and recuperation. Obara Village is also known as the home of washi (Japanese paper), and visitors can experience and learn about washi crafts at the Washi Craft Museum.

name: ホテル・ド・マロニエ内海（南知多温泉郷）
location: 愛知県 知多郡南知多町
sales_point: 南知多温泉郷の一角。種々のマリンレジャーが楽しめる、行楽向けの温泉地。
name_en: Hotel de Maronnier Utsumi (Minami Chita Onsen Resort)
sales_point_en: Part of the Minami Chita Onsen Resort. A hot spring area suitable for leisure, where various marine activities can be enjoyed.

name: 三ツ蔵温泉
sales_point: ＪＲ名古屋駅南東の栄に位置する温泉地。ホテル宿泊客と宴会利用客のみ無料で入湯できる。ビジネス客にも人気。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Sakae, southeast of JR Nagoya Station. Only hotel guests and banquet users can enter for free. It is also popular among business travelers.

name: 南知多大黒の湯（南知多温泉郷）
location: 愛知県 知多郡南知多町
sales_point: 南知多温泉郷の一角。種々のマリンレジャーが楽しめる、行楽向けの温泉地。
name_en: Minami Chita Daikoku no Yu (Minami Chita Onsen Resort)
sales_point_en: Part of the Minami Chita Onsen Resort. A hot spring area suitable for leisure, where various marine activities can be enjoyed.

name: 南知多友の湯（南知多温泉郷）
location: 愛知県 知多郡南知多町
sales_point: 南知多温泉郷の一角で知多半島の南部に位置する温泉地。海釣りの格好の基地になっている。
name_en: Minami Chita Tomonoyu (Minami Chita Onsen Resort)
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the southern part of the Chita Peninsula, part of the Minami Chita Onsen Resort. It serves as a great base for sea fishing.

name: 南知多湯本（南知多温泉郷）
location: 愛知県 知多郡南知多町
sales_point: 知多半島南部に位置し、南知多温泉郷のひとつ。マリンレジャーが楽しめる温泉地。
name_en: Minami Chita Yumoto (Minami Chita Onsen Resort)
sales_point_en: Located in the southern part of the Chita Peninsula, it is one of the Minami Chita Onsen resorts. A hot spring area where marine leisure activities can be enjoyed.

name: 美浜海炎温泉
location: 愛知県 知多郡美浜町
sales_point: 野間灯台を望む伊勢湾に面した美浜町小野浦に位置する温泉地。四季を通じて変化に富む海の眺めは最高。特に夕陽は絶景。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Onoura, Mihama Town, facing Ise Bay with a view of Noma Lighthouse. The changing views of the sea throughout the seasons are stunning, especially the sunset.

name: 三谷温泉
sales_point: 渥美半島と知多半島に囲まれた三河湾に面した温泉地。約1200年前に行基が発見したと言われ、歴史が永い。太平洋の眺望が良く観光の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area facing Mikawa Bay, surrounded by the Atsumi and Chita Peninsulas. It is said to have been discovered by the monk Gyoki about 1200 years ago, making it historically significant. It offers great views of the Pacific Ocean and is suitable as a base for sightseeing.

name: 湯谷温泉
sales_point: 鳳来寺山のふもとに位置する温泉地。鳳来峡の景観が良く風光明媚。1200年の歴史を誇る。山に囲まれた静かな環境の温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the foot of Horai-ji Mountain. It boasts beautiful scenery of the Horai Gorge and is known for its picturesque views. It has a history of 1200 years and is situated in a quiet environment surrounded by mountains.

name: 網代温泉
sales_point: 熱海市の南部に位置する温泉地。網代湾に面し、風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the southern part of Atami City. It faces Ajiro Bay and is set in a scenic environment.

name: 熱川（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 東伊豆まち温泉郷の中心となる温泉地。華やかな雰囲気が漂い情緒深い。海辺に露天風呂「高磯の湯」がある。
sales_point_en: The central hot spring area of the Higashi Izu Town Onsen Resort. It has a vibrant atmosphere and deep emotional appeal. There is an open-air bath called 'Takaiso no Yu' by the seaside.

name: 熱海温泉
sales_point: 伊豆半島東側の付け根に位置する温泉地。相模湾沿いの海岸から山手にかけて広がる、日本を代表する大温泉地。風光明媚で温暖な環境にある。海岸には、「金色夜叉」で有名な「お宮の松」がある。梅林など見所も多い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the base of the Izu Peninsula's eastern side. It is one of Japan's representative large hot spring resorts, stretching from the coastline along Sagami Bay to the mountains, in a picturesque and warm environment. The coastline features 'Omiya no Matsu,' famous from 'Kinjirō Yasha,' and there are many attractions such as plum groves.

name: 天城高原温泉
sales_point: 伊豆中央部の高原に位置する温泉地。富士山と駿河湾の両方を見渡せる風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the highlands of central Izu. It offers a scenic environment with views of both Mount Fuji and Suruga Bay.

name: 新居浜温泉
location: 静岡県 浜名郡新居町
sales_point: 浜名湖の最南端、今切口の西岸に位置する温泉地。松林に囲まれ、自然環境が良い。明るく健康的な雰囲気を持つ。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the southernmost tip of Lake Hamana, on the western shore of Imakirikuchi. Surrounded by pine forests, it has a good natural environment and a bright, healthy atmosphere.

name: 石部温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 岩地の南側の谷あいに位置する温泉地。海岸に露天風呂がある。湯量は豊富。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a valley on the southern side of Iwachi. It features open-air baths by the coast and abundant hot spring water.

name: 伊豆山温泉
sales_point: 熱海温泉北側の山あいから海岸に位置する温泉地。眺望が良く閑静な環境にある。源泉の「走り湯」が有名。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located from the mountains north of Atami Onsen down to the coast. It offers good views and a quiet environment, with the famous source 'Hashiriyu.'

name: 伊豆長岡温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 源氏山の麓に位置する温泉地。東側を古奈、西側を長岡と称する。中伊豆観光の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the foot of Genji Mountain, known as Konan to the east and Nagaoka to the west. It is a suitable base for sightseeing in central Izu.

name: 泉（伊豆湯河原）温泉
sales_point: 熱海市の東端に位置する温泉地。千歳川を挟み神奈川県の湯河原温泉と接し、伊豆湯河原とも称している。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the eastern edge of Atami City. It is adjacent to Yugawara Onsen in Kanagawa Prefecture, separated by the Chitose River, and is also known as Izu Yugawara.

name: 伊東温泉
sales_point: 松川の河畔から河口近くの海岸沿いに広がる温泉地。全国屈指の湧出量を誇る。城ヶ崎海岸等の観光スポットが点在し、風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area that spreads along the coast near the mouth of the Matsukawa River. It boasts one of the highest output volumes in the country, with many scenic spots like Jogasaki Coast nearby.

name: 稲子川温泉
location: 静岡県 富士郡芝川町
sales_point: 長者ヶ岳南側山麓の稲子川沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいの閑静な環境にある。湯・遊・ゆとりの３つの「ゆ」を他愛説に、子供からお年寄りまで幅広い年代の方が楽しめる。保養・休養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Inakogawa River at the southern foot of Chojagatake. It is in a quiet mountain environment, promoting relaxation and enjoyment for all ages, from children to the elderly.

name: 稲取（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 伊豆最大の漁港の稲取港付近に位置する温泉地。熱川と共に東伊豆まち温泉郷の中核となっている。新鮮な海産物が美味。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located near Inatori Port, the largest fishing port in Izu. It is a core part of the Higashi Izu Town Onsen area, known for its delicious fresh seafood.

name: 今井浜温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 今井浜の海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。白砂青松の風光明媚な環境にある。その砂浜の美しさから「伊豆舞子浜」とも呼ばれる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the coast of Imaihama. It is in a picturesque environment with white sand and blue pines, also known as 'Izu Maiko Beach' due to the beauty of its sandy beach.

name: 岩地温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 岩地浜の入り江に位置する温泉地。景観がよく、海水浴が楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a cove at Iwachi Beach. It offers beautiful scenery and opportunities for swimming.

name: 宇久須温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡西伊豆町
sales_point: 宇久須川河口付近の海辺に位置する温泉地。湯量は豊富。西伊豆の中央にあり、キャンプや海水浴が楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located near the mouth of the Ukusugawa River. It has abundant hot spring water and is centrally located in West Izu, ideal for camping and swimming.

name: 宇佐美温泉
sales_point: 伊東市北部の宇佐美海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。海水浴やサーフィンなどのマリンレジャーが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along Usami Beach in the northern part of Ito City. It offers marine leisure activities such as swimming and surfing.

name: 梅ヶ島温泉
sales_point: 安倍川の源流、山梨県境に近い標高1000メートルの高所に位置する温泉地。渓流沿いに宿があり、温泉情緒が漂っている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at an elevation of 1000 meters near the source of the Abe River, close to the Yamanashi Prefecture border. It features accommodations along a mountain stream, exuding a hot spring atmosphere.

name: 梅ケ島コンヤ温泉
sales_point: 安倍川上流に位置する温泉地。四方を山に囲まれた閑静な環境にある。保養、静養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located upstream of the Abe River. It is in a quiet environment surrounded by mountains, suitable for recuperation and relaxation.

name: 梅ケ島新田温泉
sales_point: 梅ヶ島温泉街の約2キロ手前に位置する温泉地。アウトドアスポーツやゴルフ、プールなどが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located about 2 kilometers before Umegashima Onsen town. It offers outdoor sports, golf, and a pool for enjoyment.

name: 瓜島温泉
location: 静岡県 富士郡芝川町
sales_point: 稲瀬川の近くに位置する温泉地。川の流れるせせらぎと鳥達のさえずりを聞きながらの露天風呂は格別。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located near the Inase River. The open-air bath, accompanied by the sound of flowing water and chirping birds, is exceptional.

name: 大川（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 東伊豆まち温泉郷の玄関口となる温泉地。紺碧の海に面した閑静な環境。波打ち際に露天風呂「磯の湯」がある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area that serves as the gateway to the Higashi Izu Town Onsen area. It is in a quiet environment facing the deep blue sea, with the open-air bath 'Iso no Yu' at the water's edge.

name: 大沢温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 池代川沿いに位置する温泉地。化粧の湯とも称され、美肌効果があると言われる。木々に囲まれとてものどかな場所。渓流では鮎釣りができる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Ikeshida River. Known as the 'beauty bath,' it is said to have skin beautifying effects. Surrounded by trees, it is a very tranquil place where you can fish for sweetfish in the stream.

name: 大滝・七滝温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 伊豆の天城峠下、河津川上流の大滝付近に位置する温泉地。野趣溢れる露天風呂が多い。中には混浴もある。また河津七滝めぐりの足場としても利用されている。
sales_point_en: Located near Otaki, upstream of the Kawazu River, at the base of the Amagi Pass in Izu. It features many outdoor baths rich in natural beauty, including some mixed bathing options. It also serves as a base for exploring the Kawazu Nanadaki waterfalls.

name: 大仁温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 大仁駅周辺に位置する温泉地。「伊豆の力こぶ」と称される城山が見守る閑静な環境にある。宮地山や箱根の山々の眺望が良い。中伊豆の穴場的存在。
sales_point_en: This onsen is situated around the Onii Station, in a quiet environment overseen by the serene Shiroyama, known as the 'Izu's Power Spot.' It offers great views of Mount Myojiyama and the Hakone mountains, making it a hidden gem in the central Izu area.

name: 小土肥温泉
sales_point: 小土肥浜の海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。海と山に囲まれ、自然環境が良く素朴な雰囲気が漂う。水平線に沈む夕日は絶景。
sales_point_en: Located along the coast of Kodoi Beach, this onsen is surrounded by the sea and mountains, exuding a rustic atmosphere. The sunset over the horizon is breathtaking.

name: 柿木温泉
sales_point: ゴルフのできる温泉ホテルは、眺望の良い高原にあり、自然を満喫できる。
sales_point_en: This onsen hotel, where you can play golf, is situated in a highland area with great views, allowing you to fully enjoy nature.

name: 片瀬（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 片瀬海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。東伊豆まち温泉郷の一角。保養や釣りに好適。
sales_point_en: Located along Katase Beach, this onsen is part of the Higashi Izu Town Onsen area. It is ideal for relaxation and fishing.

name: 川津筏場（湯ヶ野温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川の上流沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいにあり、閑静な環境。「伊豆の踊り子」の舞台としても有名。
sales_point_en: Situated upstream along the Kawazu River, this onsen is nestled in the mountains, providing a tranquil environment. It is also famous as the setting for 'Izu no Odoriko.'

name: 観音温泉
sales_point: 山峡に位置し静かな環境にある一軒宿の温泉地。PH9.2のアルカリ性の泉質で、ビロードの肌触りが特徴。飲泉も可能。
sales_point_en: This onsen is located in a mountain gorge, offering a quiet environment. It features alkaline water with a pH of 9.2, known for its velvety texture, and drinking water is also available.

name: 吉佐美温泉
sales_point: 下田湾に面した多々戸浜、入田浜にほど近い温泉地。夏は海水浴客で賑わう。
sales_point_en: Close to Tatado Beach and Irida Beach, this onsen is lively with beachgoers in the summer.

name: 口坂本温泉
sales_point: 安倍川支流の中河内川上流に位置する温泉地。山あいの閑静な環境にある。
sales_point_en: Located upstream along the Nakakawauchi River, a tributary of the Abe River, this onsen is in a quiet mountain environment.

name: 雲見温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 雲見崎の近くに位置する温泉地。波勝崎・千貫門などの探勝の基地に好適。
sales_point_en: This onsen is located near Kumomi Cape, making it a great base for exploring places like Naminaka and Senkanmon.

name: 倉真温泉
sales_point: 粟ヶ岳西側山麓の倉真川沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいの閑静な環境にあり、保養・静養に好適。散策コースも完備。
sales_point_en: Situated along the Kurama River at the foot of Mount Awagatake, this onsen is in a quiet mountain environment, ideal for relaxation and recuperation, with walking paths available.

name: 河内・蓮台寺温泉
sales_point: 緑の丘と稲生沢川に囲まれた温泉地。閑静な環境で、湯量が豊富。河内地区と蓮台寺地区に分かれる。
sales_point_en: Surrounded by green hills and the Inosawa River, this onsen offers a tranquil environment with abundant hot spring water. It is divided into Kawachi and Rendaiji areas.

name: 小鍋温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川の上流沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいにあり、ひなびた雰囲気が漂う。猪鍋が名物で、冬は狩猟客の利用が多い。
sales_point_en: Located upstream along the Kawazu River, this onsen has a rustic atmosphere. Its specialty is wild boar hot pot, and it attracts many hunting guests in winter.

name: 古奈（伊豆長岡）温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 源氏山の麓に位置する温泉地。特に東側を古奈と称する場合もある。中伊豆観光の拠点に好適。現在は伊豆長岡の一部に組み入れられている。
sales_point_en: Situated at the foot of Genji Mountain, this onsen is sometimes referred to as Kona on the eastern side. It is a great base for sightseeing in central Izu and is now part of Izu Nagaoka.

name: 駒の湯温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 韮山町北部に位置する温泉地。舟口川沿いの林の中に石づくりの露天風呂が点在しており、薬草湯など様々な温泉を堪能できる。保養・療養に好適。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: Located in the northern part of Nirayama Town, this onsen features stone outdoor baths scattered in the woods along Funaguchi River, offering various types of baths including herbal baths, ideal for relaxation and recuperation. It is a designated national health resort.

name: 小室温泉
sales_point: 伊東市の中央部に位置する温泉地。緑に花々が彩りを添える小室山公園が近い。
sales_point_en: Located in the central part of Ito City, this onsen is close to Komuroyama Park, which is adorned with greenery and flowers.

name: 御殿場高原温泉
sales_point: 富士山南東側山麓の御殿場市に位置する温泉地。富士山を望み、眺望の良い環境。地ビール、ハムなど地元の特産品を味わえる。
sales_point_en: Situated at the southeastern foot of Mount Fuji in Gotemba City, this onsen offers great views of the mountain and a pleasant environment. You can also enjoy local specialties like craft beer and ham.

name: 嵯峨沢温泉
sales_point: 狩野川沿いに位置する温泉地。自然豊かで、周辺が京都の嵯峨野に似ていることからこの名が付いた。
sales_point_en: Located along the Kano River, this onsen is rich in nature and resembles the Sagano area of Kyoto, which is how it got its name.

name: 桜田温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 松崎町北西部に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境で、湯量が豊富。露天風呂や洞窟風呂、檜風呂などがある。
sales_point_en: Located in the northwestern part of Matsuzaki Town, this onsen is in a quiet environment with abundant hot spring water. It features outdoor baths, cave baths, and cypress baths.

name: 笹原温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 天城峠への分岐点、河津浜の海岸に位置する温泉地。湯は谷津温泉から引湯している。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the junction to Amagi Pass, near the coast of Kawazu Beach. The water is sourced from Yatsu Onsen.

name: 山王峡温泉
sales_point: 麻布山西側山麓の日倉川沿いに位置する温泉地。約1キロ上流に紅葉の名所山王峡があり、遊歩道からの風景と合わせて堪能できる。また年間を通して釣りを楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Nikuragawa River on the western foothills of Azabuyama. About 1 kilometer upstream is the famous autumn foliage spot, Sannokyo, which can be enjoyed along with the scenery from the walking paths. Fishing can be enjoyed year-round.

name: 志太温泉
sales_point: 藤枝市の市街地ながら、竹林や松林に囲まれた温泉地。緑深い山裾で閑静な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area surrounded by bamboo and pine forests, located in the urban area of Fujieda City. It offers a tranquil environment at the foot of lush green mountains.

name: 下賀茂温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡南伊豆町
sales_point: 伊豆最南端に位置する温泉地。青野川沿いにあり、自然環境が良い。高温の温泉が豊富に自噴している。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the southernmost tip of Izu. Situated along the Aonogawa River, it boasts a good natural environment with abundant high-temperature hot springs.

name: 下佐ヶ野（湯ヶ野温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川の上流沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいにあり、閑静な環境。「伊豆の踊り子」の舞台としても有名。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the upstream of the Kawazu River, nestled in the mountains, providing a quiet environment. It is also famous as the setting for 'The Dancing Girl of Izu.'

name: 下田温泉
sales_point: 伊豆半島の東南端に位置する下田市の市街地にある温泉地。唐人お吉や開国に関する史跡が点在し、文化的な香りが漂う。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the urban area of Shimoda City at the southeastern tip of the Izu Peninsula. It is dotted with historical sites related to Kōji Okichi and the opening of Japan, exuding a cultural atmosphere.

name: 下田白浜温泉
sales_point: 伊豆白浜の海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。風光明媚な地で、マリンレジャーの基地に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the coast of Izu Shirahama. It is a picturesque location, ideal as a base for marine leisure activities.

name: 修善寺温泉
sales_point: 桂川の清流沿い位置する温泉地。1000年以上の歴史を誇り、しっとりとした温泉情緒が漂う。古刹の修善寺や、桂川の中州にはシンボルの「独鈷の湯」がある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the clear stream of the Katsuragawa River. With a history of over 1000 years, it exudes a moist hot spring ambiance. The ancient temple Shuzenji and the symbol 'Dokko no Yu' are located on the riverbank.

name: 白岩温泉
sales_point: 大見川沿いに位置する温泉地。湯治客も多く、近くに中伊豆温泉病院がある。閑静な環境にあり、保養・療養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Omi River. It attracts many hot spring visitors and is close to the Nakai Izu Onsen Hospital. It is in a quiet environment, suitable for recuperation and therapy.

name: 白田（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 白田川沿いに位置する温泉地。東伊豆まち温泉郷の一角。閑静な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Shirata River. It is part of the Higashiizu Town Onsen District and is situated in a quiet environment.

name: 寸又峡温泉
location: 静岡県 榛原郡川根本町
sales_point: 大無間山の南側山麓に位置する温泉地。寸又川の渓流近くの山峡にあり、自然環境が良い。湯量は豊富で「美女づくりの湯」と呼ばれる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the southern foothills of Mount Omukane. Nestled in a mountain gorge near the Sumatakawa River, it offers a good natural environment. The abundant hot spring water is known as 'Beauty-Enhancing Water.'

name: 接岨峡温泉
location: 静岡県 榛原郡川根本町
sales_point: 大井川の上流、接阻峡の渓谷沿いに位置する温泉地。自然景観が良く、渓谷沿いの散策コースもある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the upstream of the Oigawa River, in the valley of Sessokyo. It features beautiful natural scenery and walking paths along the gorge.

name: 竹倉温泉
sales_point: 閑静な環境の中にあり、素朴で飾り気のない温泉地。保養に好適。
sales_point_en: A simple and unadorned hot spring area located in a quiet environment, ideal for recuperation.

name: 田代温泉
sales_point: 大井川の上流、井川湖畔に位置する温泉地。風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the upstream of the Oigawa River, by Lake Ikawa. It is situated in a picturesque environment.

name: 対島(伊豆高原)温泉
sales_point: 大室山の東側山麓に位置する伊豆高原にある温泉地。ペンションや別荘が多く、リゾートとなっている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Izu Kogen, on the eastern foothills of Mount Omuro. It is a resort area with many pensions and villas.

name: 田中温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川沿いに位置する温泉地。早春に咲く河津桜が有名。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Kawazu River, famous for the Kawazu cherry blossoms that bloom in early spring.

name: 月ケ瀬温泉
sales_point: 狩野川沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいの閑静な環境にあり、鮎釣り等が楽しめる。月見の名所としても知られている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Kano River, in a quiet mountain environment, where you can enjoy ayu fishing. It is also known as a famous moon-viewing spot.

name: 月の湯温泉
sales_point: 駿河湾に面した温泉地。富士山を北西に望み風光明媚な環境にある。新鮮な魚が味わえる。沼津の奥座敷としてにぎわう。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area facing Suruga Bay, offering picturesque views of Mount Fuji to the northwest. It is a lively spot known for fresh seafood, often referred to as the 'back room of Numazu.'

name: 土肥温泉
sales_point: 土肥海岸沿いに位置する西伊豆最大の温泉地。温暖な気候に恵まれ、風光明媚な環境にある。西伊豆観光の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: The largest hot spring area in West Izu, located along Toi Beach. Blessed with a warm climate, it is situated in a scenic environment, making it an ideal base for sightseeing in West Izu.

name: 田牛温泉
sales_point: 下田市の最南端に位置する温泉地。サンドスキー場や、海水浴場がある。海の幸に恵まれた素朴な温泉。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located at the southernmost tip of Shimoda City, featuring a sand ski area and a swimming beach. It is a simple hot spring blessed with seafood.

name: 堂ヶ島温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡西伊豆町
sales_point: 西伊豆の堂ヶ島に位置する温泉地。自然景観が良く風光明媚な環境にある。名勝三四郎島を眺めながら入浴でき、開放感溢れる環境。観光の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in Dogashima, Nishiizu, known for its beautiful natural scenery. Guests can enjoy bathing while overlooking the scenic Sanshiro Island, providing a refreshing atmosphere. Ideal as a base for sightseeing.

name: 奈古谷温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 舟口川沿いに位置する温泉地。閑静な環境で保養・療養に好適。隣接する函南町の畑毛温泉と共に、国民保養温泉地に指定されている。
sales_point_en: A tranquil hot spring area located along the Funaguchi River, suitable for relaxation and recuperation. Designated as a national health resort along with the adjacent Hatanagi Onsen in Kannami Town.

name: 韮山温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市
sales_point: 狩野川の清流沿いに位置する温泉地。霊峰富士を仰ぎ自然景観が良い。源頼朝ゆかりの地で史跡が多く、観光拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the clear waters of the Kano River, offering great views of the sacred Mount Fuji. Rich in historical sites related to Minamoto no Yoritomo, making it a suitable base for tourism.

name: 禰宜の畑温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡西伊豆町
sales_point: 猿山の西側山麓の仁科川沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいにあり、平家の落人伝説が残される。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Nishina River at the foot of the monkey mountain. Nestled in the mountains, it is steeped in the legend of the Heike clan's fugitive.

name: 畑毛温泉
location: 静岡県 伊豆の国市／函南町
sales_point: 箱根南西側山麓の韮山・函南町にまたがる温泉地。静かな田園地帯の中に位置し、江戸初期から湯治場として親しまれている。国民保養温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area straddling the foothills of Nirayama and Kannami Town on the southwestern side of Hakone. Located in a quiet rural area, it has been a popular hot spring since the early Edo period. Designated as a national health resort.

name: 八幡温泉
sales_point: 清水市街の北部、鮎釣りで有名な興津川の上流付近に位置する温泉地。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the northern part of Shimizu City, near the upper reaches of the famous Ayu fishing river, the Okitsu River.

name: 八幡温泉
sales_point: 伊豆中央部の高原に位置する温泉地。富士山と駿河湾の両方を見渡せる風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the highlands of central Izu, offering scenic views of both Mount Fuji and Suruga Bay.

name: 河津浜温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 天城峠への分岐点、河津浜の海岸に位置する温泉地。湯は谷津温泉から引湯している。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the coast of Kawazu Hama, at the junction to the Amagi Pass. The water is sourced from Yatsu Onsen.

name: 浜名湖かんざんじ温泉
sales_point: 浜名湖東岸の半島に位置する温泉地。湖の眺望が良く、遊園地、フラワーパーク、動物園等も整備されている。浜名湖観光の拠点に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on a peninsula on the eastern shore of Lake Hamana. It offers great views of the lake and is equipped with amusement parks, flower parks, and a zoo, making it ideal as a base for Lake Hamana tourism.

name: 姫の湯温泉
sales_point: 大見川沿いに位置する温泉地。湯治客も多く、近くに中伊豆温泉病院がある。閑静な環境にあり、保養・療養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Omi River, popular among guests seeking therapeutic baths, with the Nakai Izu Onsen Hospital nearby. It is situated in a quiet environment, suitable for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 平山・北沼上温泉
sales_point: 静岡市街の北部、東海自然歩道竜爪山南麗、県道201号線沿いに位置する温泉地。日本平や、イチゴ狩りで有名な久能山に近い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the northern part of Shizuoka City, along the Tokaido Nature Trail at the southern foot of Ryuzuzan, near Nihondaira and the famous strawberry-picking area of Kunozan.

name: 浮島温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡西伊豆町
sales_point: 西伊豆町の西部、浮島海岸に隣接した温泉地。カツオ料理や磯料理が美味。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the western part of Nishiizu Town, adjacent to Ukishima Beach. Known for its delicious bonito and seafood dishes.

name: 船原温泉
sales_point: 船原峠の山麓の船原川沿いに位置する温泉地。山峡にあり自然環境に恵まれている。野球、キャンプ、陶芸などもできる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Funabara River at the foot of Funabara Pass. Nestled in a mountain gorge, it boasts a rich natural environment, with opportunities for baseball, camping, and pottery.

name: 弁天島温泉
sales_point: 浜名湖南側の弁天島に位置する温泉地。波静かな海で海水浴や潮干狩りが楽しめる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on Benten Island on the southern side of Lake Hamana. Enjoy calm seas for swimming and clam digging.

name: 法泉寺温泉
sales_point: 法泉寺川の河畔に位置する温泉地。隣接する法泉寺の和尚が開湯したと伝えられる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the banks of the Hosenji River, believed to have been opened by the monk of the adjacent Hosenji Temple.

name: 北川（東伊豆まち温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡東伊豆町
sales_point: 東伊豆まち温泉郷の一角で歓楽的要素は少ない漁村に位置する温泉地。海辺に露天風呂「黒根岩風呂」がある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a fishing village within the Higashiizu Town Onsen area, with fewer entertainment elements. Features an outdoor bath called 'Kuroneiwa Bath' by the seaside.

name: 松崎温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡松崎町
sales_point: 松崎町の市街地に位置する温泉地。ナマコ壁の建物が点在し、情緒深い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the city center of Matsuzaki Town, characterized by buildings with sea cucumber walls, creating a deep emotional atmosphere.

name: 三ケ日温泉
sales_point: 浜名湖の支湖、猪鼻湖の湖畔に位置する温泉地。温暖な気候に恵まれている。アルカリ度の高い湯で美人の湯として人気。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located on the shores of Inobana Lake, a tributary of Lake Hamana. Blessed with a warm climate, it is popular for its alkaline waters known as 'beauty baths.'

name: 南熱海（伊豆多賀）温泉
sales_point: 伊豆多賀温泉とも称され、長浜海水浴場・中野海水浴場が近い温泉地。相模湾の海の幸を満喫できる。通年観光客で賑わう。
sales_point_en: Also known as Izu Taga Onsen, this hot spring area is close to Nagahama Beach and Nakano Beach, allowing guests to enjoy the seafood of Sagami Bay. It is bustling with tourists year-round.

name: 峰温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川沿いに位置する温泉地。開湯1000年と永い歴史を誇る。谷津温泉の北隣にあり、湯量豊富。温泉熱を利用した花卉栽培が盛ん。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Kawazu River, boasting a long history of 1000 years since its opening. It is adjacent to Yatsu Onsen and has abundant hot spring water, with active cultivation of flowers using geothermal heat.

name: 持越温泉
sales_point: ゴルフ場のある高原に位置する温泉地。近くには温泉スタンドもあり、自由に温泉が求められる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a highland with a golf course. There is also a hot spring stand nearby, allowing for easy access to the hot spring.

name: 桃沢温泉
location: 静岡県 駿東郡長泉町
spa_quality: ナトリウム・カルシウム－塩化物・硫酸塩温泉
sales_point: 長泉町の北部、愛鷹山南側山麓に位置する温泉地。ナトリウム・カルシウム分を含む弱アルカリ性の温泉。露天風呂が人気。
spa_quality_en: ナトリウム・カルシウム－塩化物・硫酸塩温泉
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the northern part of Nakaizu Town, at the foot of Mount Aitakusan. It features a weak alkaline hot spring rich in sodium and calcium. The outdoor baths are particularly popular.

name: 焼津温泉
sales_point: 水揚げ金額日本一のさかなの街 焼津の北東部に位置する温泉地。焼津温泉はリゾートスタイルのホテルから気軽な日帰り温泉、足湯など市内9か所で楽しむことができる。「温泉総選挙」では3年連続第一位に輝いた。
sales_point_en: Located in the northeastern part of Yaizu, known as the city with the highest fish catch in Japan. Yaizu Onsen can be enjoyed at nine locations in the city, from resort-style hotels to casual day-use hot springs and foot baths. It has won first place in the 'Onsen General Election' for three consecutive years.

name: 八木沢温泉
sales_point: 八木沢海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。海水浴が楽しめる。温暖で閑静な環境。保養・休養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along Yagisawa Beach, perfect for enjoying sea bathing. It offers a warm and quiet environment, ideal for relaxation and recuperation.

name: 谷津温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川沿いに位置する温泉地。僧行基が約1500年前に発見した温泉は源泉も多く、湯量も大変豊富。峰温泉の隣で山里ののどかな雰囲気が漂う。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Kawazu River. The hot spring, discovered by the monk Gyoki about 1500 years ago, has many sources and abundant hot water. It is adjacent to Mine Onsen and has a tranquil rural atmosphere.

name: 柳瀬温泉
sales_point: 中伊豆の山間に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境で、テニスなどのスポーツが楽しめる。休養に絶好で家族連れに好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in the mountainous region of Nakaizu. It offers a quiet environment and opportunities for sports like tennis, making it perfect for family visits and relaxation.

name: 雄踏温泉
sales_point: 浜名湖沿いに位置する温泉地。様々なマリンスポーツの拠点として好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along Lake Hamana, suitable as a base for various marine sports.

name: 湯ヶ島温泉
sales_point: 狩野川と猫越川の合流点付近に位置する温泉地。山あいの渓谷沿いにあり、自然環境に恵まれている。多くの作家に愛されてきた。「伊豆の踊り子」で余りにも有名。
sales_point_en: Located near the confluence of the Kano River and the Nekogoshi River, this hot spring area is blessed with a beautiful natural environment. It has been loved by many writers and is famously featured in 'Izu no Odoriko' (The Dancing Girl of Izu).

name: 湯ヶ野（湯ヶ野温泉郷）
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡河津町
sales_point: 河津川の上流沿いに位置する温泉地。山あいにあり、閑静な環境。「伊豆の踊り子」の舞台としても有名。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located upstream along the Kawazu River, nestled in the mountains and offering a quiet environment. It is also famous as the setting for 'Izu no Odoriko.'

name: 油野温泉
sales_point: 緑濃い山里に位置する温泉地。閑静な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a lush green mountain village, providing a tranquil environment.

name: 弓ヶ浜温泉
location: 静岡県 賀茂郡南伊豆町
sales_point: 弓ヶ浜海岸沿いに位置する温泉地。下田と石廊崎の中間で、風光明媚な環境にある。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along Yumigahama Beach, situated between Shimoda and Cape Irozaki, in a picturesque environment.

name: 油山温泉
sales_point: 静岡駅の北側、約14キロの山あいに位置する温泉地。効能の高いいで湯で、湯治場としての歴史は永い。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located about 14 kilometers north of Shizuoka Station, in the mountains. It is known for its highly effective hot springs and has a long history as a healing spot.

name: 横川温泉
sales_point: 稲生沢川上流の山里に位置する温泉地。昔ながらの湯治場の面影が今なお残っている。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located in a mountain village upstream of the Inosawa River, retaining the charm of a traditional hot spring resort.

name: 吉奈温泉
sales_point: 吉奈川沿いに位置する温泉地。奈良時代の開湯と伝えられ歴史が永い。静かな環境にあり、「子宝の湯」として知られる。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Yoshina River, believed to have been opened in the Nara period, with a long history. It is in a quiet environment and is known as the 'hot spring for fertility.'

name: わさび平温泉
location: 静岡県 駿東郡小山町
sales_point: 御殿場IC近くの高原にあり、ゴルフ場も近い。自然浴ができる環境にある。
sales_point_en: Located in a highland near the Gotemba IC, with a golf course nearby. It offers an environment suitable for nature bathing.

name: 蕨野温泉
sales_point: 安倍川沿いに位置する閑静な山あいにあり、保養・静養に好適。
sales_point_en: A quiet hot spring area located along the Abe River, ideal for recuperation and relaxation.

name: 原保温泉
sales_point: 大見川沿いに位置する温泉地。湯治客も多く、近くに中伊豆温泉病院がある。閑静な環境にあり、保養・療養に好適。
sales_point_en: A hot spring area located along the Omi River, frequented by many hot spring visitors, with the Nakai Izu Onsen Hospital nearby. It is in a quiet environment, suitable for recuperation and therapy.
